parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'metabase_report_dashboards_json' THEN value END) AS metabase_report_dashboards_json,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'metabase_report_redaction_profiles_json' THEN value END) AS metabase_report_redaction_profiles_json
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('n8n_base_url', 'metabase_report_dashboards_json', 'metabase_report_redaction_profiles_json');
